_comment: Gatherable resource categories. A category binds a family of nodes to the one non-combat skill that harvests it, and carries the node's map colour so the client can tell an ore vein from a herb patch from a tree without shipping a per-resource palette. Every resource config names a category; the loader checks the resource's own 'skill' agrees with the category's, so a herb that awards mineralogy is a config error rather than a quiet oddity.
